# `/save` Command
Control or check how the game saves data to disk.

<table>
  <tr>
    <th>Permission Level</th>
    <td>Owner</td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
    <th>Requires Cheats?</th>
    <td>Yes</td>
  </tr>
</table>

## Usage
### `/save <mode: SaveMode>`

## Arguments
- `mode`: SaveMode

## Enums
### `SaveMode`

#### Values
- `query`
- `hold`
- `resume`
